message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "db" as pkg_db {
  interface "ConnectionDB" as ConnectionDB

  class "LazyHolderDB" as LazyHolderDB {
    {static} final INSTANCE : ConnectionDBMySQL
  }

  class "ConnectionDBMySQL" as ConnectionDBMySQL {
    - connection : Connection
    + ConnectionDBMySQL()
    + getInstance() : ConnectionDBMySQL
    + getDb() : Connection
    + setDb() : Connection
  }

  ConnectionDBMySQL ..|> ConnectionDB
  LazyHolderDB ..> ConnectionDBMySQL : INSTANCE
}

package "gui" as pkg_gui {
  package "controller" as pkg_controller {

    class "OfferController" as OfferController {
      - FAQ : ListView
      - answerQuestion : ButtonBar
      - update : ButtonBar
      - updateQuestion : ButtonBar
      - newQuestion : ButtonBar
      - rateArea : ButtonBar
      - handleNewQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleNewAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleUpdateQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleDeleteQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleDeleteAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleDeleteScoreQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleDeleteScoreAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleUpdateScoreAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class "NewQuestionController" as NewQuestionController {
      - questionArea : JTextArea
      - postQuestion : JButton
      - cancel : JButton
      - handleNewQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - handleLoadAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - cancel(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class "NewAnswerController" as NewAnswerController {
      - answerArea : JTextArea
      - postAnswer : JButton
      - cancel : JButton
      - handleNewAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      - cancel(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class "LoadView" as LoadView {
      - loadNameFXML : Parent : Parent
      + changeScreen(actionEvent : ActionEvent, view : String) : void
    }
  }
}

package "business" as pkg_business {

  class "FAQFacade" as FAQFacade {
    + getQuestionById(id : int) : Question
    + getAnswerById(id : int) : Answer
    + createQuestion(id : int, userid : int, offerid : int, question : String, score : int) : Question
    + createAnswer(id : int, userid : int, answer : String, score : int) : Answer
    + getQuestionsByOfferId(offerid : int) : ArrayList<Question>
    + getAnswersByOfferId(offerid : int) : ArrayList<Answer>
    + updateQuestionScore(id : int, userid : int, offerid : int, question : String, score : int) : Question
    + updateAnswerScore(id : int, userid : int, answer : String, score : int) : Answer
    + deleteQuestion(id : int) : boolean
    + deleteAnswer(id : int) : boolean
  }

  class "Question" as Question {
    - questionId : int
    - content : String
    - score : int
    - answerId : int
    - userId : int
    - offerId : int
    + Question()
    + getQuestionId() : int
    + getContent() : String
    + getScore() : int
    + getAnswerId() : int
    + getUserId() : int
    + getOfferId() : int
    + setQuestionId(questionId : int) : void
    + setContent(content : String) : void
    + setScore(score : int) : void
    + setAnswerId(answerId : int) : void
    + setUserId(userId : int) : void
    + setOfferId(categoryId : int) : void
  }

  class "Answer" as Answer {
    - answerId : int
    - content : String
    - score : int
    - userId : int
    - answer()
    + getAnswerId() : int
    + getContent() : String
    + getScore() : int
    + getUserId() : int
    + setAnswerId(answerId : int) : void
    + setContent(content : String) : void
    + setScore(score : int) : void
    + setUserId(userId : int) : void
  }

  class "SessionFacade" as SessionFacade {
    + SessionFacade()
    + getUser() : User
  }

  FAQFacade --> Question
  FAQFacade --> Answer
  FAQFacade --> SessionFacade
  pkg_controller.OfferController --> FAQFacade
  pkg_controller.NewQuestionController --> FAQFacade
  pkg_controller.NewAnswerController --> FAQFacade
}

package "dao" as pkg_dao {

  interface "DAO" as DAO {
    + find(id : int) : T
    + create(obj : T) : T
    + update(obj : T) : T
    + delete(obj : T) : boolean
  }

  abstract class "AnswerDao" as AnswerDao {
    - OfferDao()
    + getInstance() : QuestionDao
    + getAnswersByOfferId(offerid : int) : ArrayList<Answer>
    + answerExists(id : int) : boolean
  }

  abstract class "QuestionDao" as QuestionDao {
    - getInstance() : QuestionDao
    + LazyHolder()
    + getQuestionsByOfferId(offerid : int) : ArrayList<Question>
    + questionExists(id : int) : boolean
    + hasAnAnswer(id : int) : boolean
  }

  abstract class "AbstractFactoryDao" as AbstractFactoryDao {
    {static} final connectionDb : ConnectionDB
    {static} + getFactory(typeDB : TypeDB) : AbstractFactoryDao
    + getAnswerDao() : AnswerDao
    + getQuestionDao() : QuestionDao
  }

  class "AnswerDaoMySQL" as AnswerDaoMySQL
  class "QuestionDaoMySQL" as QuestionDaoMySQL
  class "FactoryDaoMySQL" as FactoryDaoMySQL

  AnswerDao ..|> DAO
  QuestionDao ..|> DAO

  AnswerDaoMySQL --|> AnswerDao
  QuestionDaoMySQL --|> QuestionDao

  FactoryDaoMySQL --|> AbstractFactoryDao

  AbstractFactoryDao --> ConnectionDB
  AnswerDao --> AbstractFactoryDao
  QuestionDao --> AbstractFactoryDao

  pkg_business.FAQFacade --> AnswerDao
  pkg_business.FAQFacade --> QuestionDao
}

@enduml
```
